passages.passage_text:
Directions (Q. Nos. 32-34) Study the following statements A, B, C, D and E and then answer the questions that follow.
A. 1, 5, 9 means : 'you better go'
B. 1, 6, 7 means : 'better come here'
C. 5, 6, 7 means : 'you come here'
D. 1, 5, 6 means : 'better you here'
E. 3, 7, 9 means : 'come and go'

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If 'DOG' is called 'CAT', 'CAT' is called 'FOX', 'FOX' is called 'SNAKE', 'SNAKE' is called 'MONKEY', 'MONKEY' is called 'OX' and 'OX' is called 'HORSE', then which of the following is a reptile?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If 'water' is called 'food', 'food' is called 'tree', 'tree' is called 'sky', 'sky' is called 'wall', on which of the following does a 'fruit' grow?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If 'TELEVISION' is called 'CALCULATER', 'CALCULATER' is called 'PEN', 'PEN' is called 'BOOK', 'BOOK' is called 'PILLOW', 'PILLOW' is called 'BED', then what do we use to write?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If 'RAT' is called 'CAT', 'CAT' is called 'DOG', 'DOG' is called 'LION', 'LION' is called 'COW', 'COW' is called 'FOX', 'FOX' is called 'ASS', then which of the following animal roars?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If 'BLACK' means 'PINK', 'PINK' means 'BLUE', 'BLUE' means 'WHITE', 'WHITE' means 'YELLOW', 'YELLOW' means 'RED' and 'RED' means 'BROWN'. Then, what is the colour of clear sky?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If 'Star' is called 'Planet', 'Planet' is called 'Satellite', 'Satellite' is called 'Galaxy', 'Galaxy' is called 'Comet', then 'Earth' is classified under which category?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If 'milk' is called 'curd', 'curd' is called 'salt', 'salt' is called 'sugar', 'sugar' is called 'water', then what is used to mean tea sweet?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If 'bread' is called 'rice', 'rice' is called 'egg', 'egg' is called 'aeroplane', 'aeroplane' is called 'car', 'car' is called 'bike', then which of the vehicle has four wheels?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If in a certain code language 'TORCH' is coded as 'GLIIXS', how would you code 'MANUAL' in the same language?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If 'CHAMBER' is coded as 'XSZNVYI', how will coded word 'WLFYOV' relate to the basic word through that coding language?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If in a certain code language 'TROUP' is written as 'YFOSK', then how will 'SIGHT' be written in that language?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If in a certain code language 'MANUAL' is coded as '131142112', 'TRIANGLE' is coded as '201891147125', then how will 'FIVE' be coded in that language?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If in a certain code language 'GOOD' is coded as '20121223', 'ONE' is coded as '121322', then how will 'FRUIT' be coded in that language?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: In a certain code language '123' stands for 'I am servant', '279' stands for 'servant always miserable', and '684' stands for 'poverty is curse'. Then, 'miserable' stands for which numeric?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: In a certain code language, '493' means 'Friendship Big Challenge', '961' means 'Struggle Big Exam' and '178' means 'Exam Confidential Subject'. What does 'Confidential' stand for?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: In a code language '157' means 'mother always lovable', '619' means 'always happy future' and '952' means 'mother very happy'. What does the word 'future' stand for in the same language?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following groups of minimum statements are necessary to find the code number of 'better'?
